title: dryopteris varia subsp. sacrosancta
intro: Dryopteris varia subsp. sacrosancta, also known as the 'Sacred Autumn Fern', is a subspecies of the Dryopteris varia fern native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris varia subsp. sacrosancta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or decoction, or it can be taken as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
